entries.name: Distant Thunder
entries.description: The air is tense. Storm clouds gather but have not yet broken.

entries.name: Heavy Swell
entries.description: Waves rise before the wind. Movement on deck becomes dangerous.

entries.name: Hard Rain
entries.description: Rain lashes the deck. Visibility is poor and torches or lanterns struggle.

entries.name: Screaming Wind
entries.description: Rigging howls and sails strain. Crew checks are needed to avoid damage.

entries.name: Lightning Strike
entries.description: Lightning hits nearby or strikes ship hardware. Panic and damage are possible.

entries.name: Rogue Wave
entries.description: A huge wave slams the vessel. Unsecured crew or cargo may be thrown.

entries.name: Full Tropical Storm
entries.description: Travel is dangerous. The ship must ride the storm or risk hull and mast damage.

entries.name: Eye of the Storm
entries.description: A sudden impossible calm opens inside chaos. Something may be seen in the clouds or sea.
